name: lapscore
description: Premium PC Health Monitor with Battery Intelligence, AI Readiness, and Fleet Management.
author: LapScore Team

scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.dev: cross-env AUTO_OPEN=false concurrently "node server/index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "cross-env AUTO_OPEN=false node server/index.js" "wait-on http://localhost:7821/api/health && electron ."
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ..
